data_description.environment: Pick prod or staging to fill the URL automatically, or 'custom' to enter your own.
data_description.api_url: Only for 'custom' — base URL of your kio API, e.g. http://api.kio.example.local
data_description.api_key: API key (X-API-Key) for the chosen environment. Leave blank if auth is disabled.
data_description.api_ip: Only for 'custom'. If HA cannot resolve the hostname (.int TLD DNS issue), enter the server IP here.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure kio
reconfigure.description: Switch which environment this integration mirrors (prod/staging), or update its API key. Switching environments changes which kiosks appear.

data_description.environment: Choose prod or staging to switch source of truth; 'custom' to enter your own URL.
data_description.api_url: Only for 'custom' — base URL of your kio API.
data_description.api_key: API key (X-API-Key) for the chosen environment. Leave blank if auth is disabled.
data_description.api_ip: Only for 'custom'. If HA cannot resolve the hostname, enter the server IP here.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the kio API. Check the URL and network.
error.url_required: Choose an environment, or enter an API URL for 'custom'.

abort.already_configured: This kio environment is already configured.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force an immediate data refresh from the kio API for all configured instances.

navigate.name: Navigate
navigate.description: Point one or more kiosks at a URL.

url.name: URL
url.description: The URL to load on the kiosk.
